title: dactylorhiza × mulignensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × mulignensis, a hybrid orchid species, is a rare and unique plant resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Dactylorhiza incarnata. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × mulignensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into capsules, teas, or infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
